if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND b.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND b.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmEventBenefit :: selectById */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_bt.code_label AS benefit_type_cd_nm FROM pm_event_benefit b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_bt ON cd_bt.code_grp = 'BENEFIT_TYPE' AND cd_bt.code_value = b.benefit_type_cd WHERE b.benefit_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmEventBenefit :: selectList */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_bt.code_label AS benefit_type_cd_nm FROM pm_event_benefit b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_bt ON cd_bt.code_grp = 'BENEFIT_TYPE' AND cd_bt.code_value = b.benefit_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmEventBenefit :: selectPageList */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_bt.code_label AS benefit_type_cd_nm FROM pm_event_benefit b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_bt ON cd_bt.code_grp = 'BENEFIT_TYPE' AND cd_bt.code_value = b.benefit_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(b.*) /* base.ec.pm :: PmEventBenefit :: selectPageCount */ FROM pm_event_benefit b
